diagrams.title: Transaction State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of a database transaction from active to committed or aborted state
diagrams.purpose: Understanding transaction processing and recovery concepts

diagrams.title: Database Backup Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Visual representation of different backup categories and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding backup strategies and recovery options

diagrams.title: Lock Compatibility Matrix
diagrams.description: Matrix showing which lock types can coexist for the same data item
diagrams.purpose: Understanding concurrency control and deadlock prevention

diagrams.title: Database Recovery Process Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of database recovery after system failure
diagrams.purpose: Understanding recovery mechanisms and transaction log usage
